sglang.title: Add timeout to get_meta_info
sglang.author: SimoneRaponi
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
This PR closes #340
Currently, the StreamExecutor.get_meta_info function does not have a way to prevent deadlock.
The changes provided in this PR allows to manage the case and raise a TimeoutError should it happen.

vllm.title: [3/N] Refactor scheduler for chunked prefill scheduling
vllm.author: rkooo567
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Refactor the current scheduler to make it easy to understand with chunked prefill later.
This simply moves logic for prefill scheduling and decoding scheudling to a dedicated function. The purpose of doing this is we want the different scheduling policy for chunked prefill (by default, we do prefill

vllm.title: Enable scaled FP8 (e4m3fn) KV cache on ROCm (AMD GPU)
vllm.author: AdrianAbeyta
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
As part of a series of FP8 development in vLLM, we address an OCP format (nVIDIA compatible) FP8 KV cache in this pull request. We elaborated upon previous #2279, but made following change, enhancement and extensions:

Using OCP FP8 data type, E4M3 recommended for inference (as Float8E4M3FN in MLIR,

vllm.title: Fixes the argument for local_tokenizer_group
vllm.author: sighingnow
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Before this PR, in RayTokenizerGroupPool, the tokenizer_config isn't passed to self._local_tokenizer_group, makes it failed to initialize for tokenizers which requires configuration like trust_remote_code=True.

vllm.title: [Core] Enable hf_transfer by default if available
vllm.author: michaelfeil
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This is a "quality of life" PR. It auto enables the hf_transfer backend of huggingface_hub. As explained in #2907, hf_transfer should be safe to use, e.g. is the default in TGI since pretty long. https://github.com/huggingface/text-generation-inference/blob/92bb56b0c1038a35f73a6c96c506f6d1c3d7b043/D

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Add kv_scale input parameter to CPU backend
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR fixes the broken CPU CI by adding the kv_scale parameter to the attention-related kernels for CPUs.

vllm.title: [Core] [Frontend] Make detokenization optional
vllm.author: mgerstgrasser
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #3635
This PR makes detokenization optional during generation. The changes here are the minimal ones required to enable this: We add an optional detokenize argument to SamplingParams which defaults to True. In LLMEngine we then skip detokenization if detokenize is set to False for the current re
